title: Nyra sidecar automatico connector
rule: Codex deve aggiornare questa checklist man mano che chiude i punti. Finalize blocca se restano item required open.

items.label: Gate e analisi connector
evidence: Core gate ALLOWED codex_automation; ispezionati cli.mjs work-start/checkpoint/finalize/eventAppend per hook sidecar Nyra no-op

items.label: Sidecar Nyra automatico
evidence: packages/core-codex-connector/src/cli.mjs hook interno su work-start/checkpoint/finalize; report reports/codex-core/nyra_sidecar_latest.json; CLI esterna invariata

items.label: Test connector/Nyra
evidence: node packages/core-codex-connector/src/cli.mjs --help; sidecar smoke work-start/checkpoint/finalize; npm run check:nyra:codex-memory-importer; npm run check:nyra:local-governance; npm run check:nyra:chat-rich; JSONL/report validation

items.label: Finalize
evidence: Checkpoint during/after completati; Core gate finale ALLOWED; Program Registry READY; pronto finalize con report e lock release
